text:
theDOGS is the soundtrack album containing original music for the compilation movie Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa, composed by .

Track listing

theDOGS | Lyrics: Benjamin & mpi | Vocal: mpi
YAMANAIAME ＜FMv＞ | Lyrics: Benjamin & mpi | Vocal: Mica Caldito
TheWeightOfLives
theDOGS (Instrumental)
YAMANAIAME ＜FMv＞ (Instrumental)

Liner Notes

Produced by HIROYUKI SAWANO
Co-produced, directed by YASUSHI HORIGUCHI (Legendoor)
Recording, Mixing Engineer & Protools Operator: MITSUNORI AIZAWA (SIGN SOUND) * M1,2,4,5
JUNICHIRO "Ojjy" OJIMA (BUNGEE STUDIO) * M3
Mastering Engineer: YUJI CHINONE (Sony Music Studios Tokyo)
Assistant Engineer: SORA TAMIYA (LAB recorders), SHO SUZUKI (Studio Sound Valley), HARUKI SAITO (Sound City)
Recorded at LAB recorders, Studio Sound Valley, Sound City
Mixed at Studio Sound Valley
Mastered at Sony Music Studios Tokyo
